policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-aps-17 - Audit for latest version of application framework'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+App+Service#IncidentremediationAppService#drcp-aps-17 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP App Service Function App Slot Linux Python version
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents the usage of older or outdated Python versions. Periodically, newer versions are released for Python software either due to security flaws or to include additional functionality. Using the latest Python version for App Service Function apps is recommended in order to take advantage of security fixes and/or new functionalities. This policy only applies to Linux apps and requires the usage of a specfic Python version.

drcp.name: AppServiceFunctionSlotLinuxPythonVersion
drcp.controlDesc: Audit for latest version of application framework

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
Specify the supported Python versions for Linux App Service.
